rows with grade_value IS NULL are excluded from the result.","Averages use SQL AVG(...) which ignores NULL score values.","Output is in long form (grade_value, metric, avg_score) to support a grouped bar chart (one row per grade_value × metric).","Literal metric names ('exam','project','attendance') will be used in the metric column.","No joins to other tables are required for this request.","If a wide format (one row per grade_value with three avg columns) is preferred, the SQL/visual mapping would need to change accordingly."]},"attempt":2,"maxAttempts":4,"previousAttempt":{"sql":"WITH agg AS (
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    AVG(exam_score) AS avg_exam,
    AVG(project_score) AS avg_project,
    AVG(attendance_score) AS avg_attendance
  FROM public.grades
  WHERE grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY grade_value
)
SELECT
  grade_value AS grade_value,
  'exam'::text AS metric,
  avg_exam AS avg_score
FROM agg
UNION ALL
SELECT
  grade_value AS grade_value,
  'project'::text AS metric,
  avg_project AS avg_score
FROM agg
UNION ALL
SELECT
  grade_value AS grade_value,
  'attendance'::text AS metric,
  avg_attendance AS avg_score
FROM agg

visualization.title: Average exam, project, and attendance scores by grade value

resultRaw.sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    AVG(exam_score) AS avg_exam,
    AVG(project_score) AS avg_project,
    AVG(attendance_score) AS avg_attendance
  FROM public.grades
  WHERE grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY grade_value
)
SELECT
  t.grade_value AS grade_value,
  t.metric AS metric,
  t.avg_score AS avg_score
FROM (
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'exam'::text AS metric,
    avg_exam AS avg_score
  FROM agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'project'::text AS metric,
    avg_project AS avg_score
  FROM agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'attendance'::text AS metric,
    avg_attendance AS avg_score
  FROM agg
) AS t
ORDER BY
  t.grade_value ASC,
  CASE t.metric WHEN 'exam' THEN 1 WHEN 'project' THEN 2 WHEN 'attendance' THEN 3 END

issues: All encoded fields (grade_value, avg_score, metric) exist in metadata.columns and are used appropriately.
grade_value appears as string-like values in the sample (e.g., "2.0"); if you expect numeric ordering, ensure grade_value is numeric in the DB or explicitly cast/sort as intended.

The chart uses xOffset for grouped bars—confirm your Vega-Lite renderer supports xOffset for grouped bar rendering; if not, a standard grouped bar can be achieved by keeping x=grade_value and using color=metric with a column/facet or appropriate transform.

result.sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    AVG(exam_score) AS avg_exam,
    AVG(project_score) AS avg_project,
    AVG(attendance_score) AS avg_attendance
  FROM public.grades
  WHERE grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY grade_value
)
SELECT
  t.grade_value AS grade_value,
  t.metric AS metric,
  t.avg_score AS avg_score
FROM (
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'exam'::text AS metric,
    avg_exam AS avg_score
  FROM agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'project'::text AS metric,
    avg_project AS avg_score
  FROM agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    grade_value AS grade_value,
    'attendance'::text AS metric,
    avg_attendance AS avg_score
  FROM agg
) AS t
ORDER BY
  t.grade_value ASC,
  CASE t.metric WHEN 'exam' THEN 1 WHEN 'project' THEN 2 WHEN 'attendance' THEN 3 END
